proposals.reasoning: Many lines identified as headers are actually labels, values, or sub-elements within existing sections (e.g., meeting details, instructor contact info, textbook attributes, table column headers). The '<' is an HTML entity that should be cleaned up to its character equivalent. No institutional boilerplate was identified that should be stripped entirely.
